analysis: Agents are managed via JWT-authenticated admin endpoints. All mutations require user role ADMIN. API key is returned plaintext only on POST /agents (create) and POST /agents/:slug/rotate-key — never retrievable again after that. The web uses vee-validate + toTypedSchema + zod for forms (see CreateProjectDialog.vue). The $api composable exposes get/post/patch/delete. Errors are extracted via extractApiError(). Toasts use useAppToast(). Dialogs use Shadcn-nuxt Dialog components. All text must be i18n-keyed in both en.json and zh.json.

userStories.title: CreateAgentDialog with API key reveal
userStories.description: Create apps/web/components/CreateAgentDialog.vue. Follow CreateProjectDialog.vue exactly for the form pattern (vee-validate + toTypedSchema + zod, Dialog/DialogContent/DialogHeader/DialogTitle/DialogFooter, FormField/FormItem/FormLabel/FormControl/FormMessage). Fields: name (string, required), slug (string, required, pattern /^[a-z0-9-]+$/, auto-derived from name on input as kebab-case but user-editable), roles (multi-checkbox VERIFIER/DEVELOPER/REVIEWER, min 1 required), capabilities (tag input — Input + Enter to add, Badge with X to remove, stored as string[]), maxConcurrentTickets (number input, default 3, min 1). On submit call $api.post('/agents', { name, slug, roles, capabilities, maxConcurrentTickets }). On success: switch dialog to 'key reveal' view showing a read-only Input with the apiKey value from response and a Copy button. Copy button uses navigator.clipboard.writeText, shows 'Copied!' for 2 seconds then reverts. Include a warning paragraph: 'Copy this API key now. It will not be shown again.' Show Done button to close. On close: emit 'created'. On API error: toast.error(extractApiError(err)). In apps/web/pages/agents.vue, add a 'Create Agent' Button in the PageHeader area (right side) that opens this dialog. On 'created' event, call refresh(). Add all new i18n keys to apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json and apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json under the 'agents' namespace.
acceptanceCriteria: components/CreateAgentDialog.vue renders a Dialog with name, slug, roles (checkboxes), capabilities (tag input), and maxConcurrentTickets fields
Typing in the name field auto-populates slug as kebab-case (e.g. 'Subrina Coder' → 'subrina-coder') but the slug field remains user-editable
Submitting with zero roles checked shows a validation error on the roles field
Form submission calls $api.post('/agents', body) where body contains name, slug, roles (string[]), capabilities (string[]), maxConcurrentTickets (number)
On API success, the dialog content switches to a key-reveal view showing the apiKey in a read-only Input with a Copy button
Clicking Copy writes apiKey to clipboard and changes button text to the 'agents.apiKeyReveal.copied' i18n string for 2 seconds
Key-reveal view contains a warning using the 'agents.apiKeyReveal.message' i18n key
Clicking Done in key-reveal view closes the dialog and emits 'created'
pages/agents.vue has a Button labeled t('agents.createAgent') that opens CreateAgentDialog
On 'created' event, pages/agents.vue calls refresh()

routing.reasoning: multi-field form + two-phase dialog (form → key reveal) + clipboard API — medium complexity UI work, no business logic to unit test

userStories.title: EditAgentRolesDialog and EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog
userStories.description: Create two dialog components. (1) apps/web/components/EditAgentRolesDialog.vue: accepts :agent prop (Agent type). Renders a Dialog with three checkboxes for VERIFIER, DEVELOPER, REVIEWER. Pre-checks the roles from agent.roles. On submit calls $api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-roles', { roles: string[] }). On success: toast.success(t('agents.toast.rolesUpdated')), emit 'updated', close dialog. On error: toast.error(extractApiError(err)). (2) apps/web/components/EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog.vue: accepts :agent prop. Renders a Dialog with a tag-input UI — existing capabilities shown as Badge components each with an X button to remove. An Input field at bottom: typing and pressing Enter appends to the list. On submit calls $api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-capabilities', { capabilities: string[] }). On success: toast.success(t('agents.toast.capabilitiesUpdated')), emit 'updated', close dialog. In apps/web/pages/agents.vue, extend the DropdownMenuContent for each agent row to include DropdownMenuItems for 'Edit Roles' and 'Edit Capabilities' that open the respective dialogs with the target agent. On 'updated' event from either dialog, call refresh(). Add all new i18n keys to en.json and zh.json.
acceptanceCriteria: components/EditAgentRolesDialog.vue accepts an agent prop and pre-checks agent.roles in three VERIFIER/DEVELOPER/REVIEWER checkboxes
Submitting EditAgentRolesDialog calls $api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-roles', { roles }) with the selected roles as string[]
On EditAgentRolesDialog success, toast.success is called and the dialog emits 'updated'
components/EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog.vue accepts an agent prop and renders agent.capabilities as Badge tags each with an X remove button
Pressing Enter in the capabilities Input appends the typed value to the tag list (does not submit the form)
Submitting EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog calls $api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/update-capabilities', { capabilities }) with the current tag list as string[]
On EditAgentCapabilitiesDialog success, toast.success is called and the dialog emits 'updated'
pages/agents.vue actions DropdownMenu includes 'Edit Roles' and 'Edit Capabilities' items per row
pages/agents.vue calls refresh() when either dialog emits 'updated'

routing.reasoning: two modals with pre-population and tag-input UI — medium complexity, no business logic

userStories.title: RotateKeyDialog and DeleteAgentDialog
userStories.description: Create two destructive-action dialog components. (1) apps/web/components/RotateKeyDialog.vue: accepts :agent prop. Renders a confirmation Dialog with the 'agents.rotateKey.confirm' i18n message and a 'Rotate Key' button. On confirm: call $api.post('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/rotate-key', {}). On success: switch dialog to key-reveal view (same pattern as CreateAgentDialog: read-only Input with apiKey, Copy button with 2s 'Copied!' feedback, warning text 'agents.apiKeyReveal.message'). Done button closes dialog and emits 'rotated'. On error: toast.error(extractApiError(err)). (2) apps/web/components/DeleteAgentDialog.vue: accepts :agent prop. Renders a confirmation Dialog with agent.name in the message (t('agents.deleteAgent.confirm', { name: agent.name })). On confirm: call $api.delete('/agents/' + agent.slug). On success: toast.success(t('agents.toast.deleted')), emit 'deleted', close dialog. On error: toast.error(extractApiError(err)). In apps/web/pages/agents.vue, extend the DropdownMenuContent per agent row to include 'Rotate Key' (opens RotateKeyDialog) and 'Delete' (opens DeleteAgentDialog, styled as destructive). On 'deleted' event call refresh(). On 'rotated' event call refresh(). Add all new i18n keys to en.json and zh.json.
acceptanceCriteria: components/RotateKeyDialog.vue renders a confirmation Dialog with a Rotate Key button; clicking it calls $api.post('/agents/' + agent.slug + '/rotate-key', {})
On rotate-key success, dialog switches to key-reveal view showing the new apiKey in a read-only Input with a Copy button
RotateKeyDialog Copy button writes new apiKey to clipboard and shows 'Copied!' for 2 seconds
RotateKeyDialog Done button closes the dialog and emits 'rotated'
components/DeleteAgentDialog.vue renders a confirmation Dialog containing agent.name in the confirmation message
Confirming DeleteAgentDialog calls $api.delete('/agents/' + agent.slug)
On delete success, toast.success is called, dialog closes, and 'deleted' is emitted
pages/agents.vue actions DropdownMenu includes 'Rotate Key' and 'Delete' items per row
pages/agents.vue calls refresh() on both 'rotated' and 'deleted' events

routing.reasoning: two confirm dialogs — one with key-reveal phase (reuses CreateAgentDialog pattern), one simple delete confirm
